nasb.text: It is He who changes the times and the epochs; He removes kings and establishes kings; He gives wisdom to wise men And knowledge to men of understanding.

esv.text: He changes times and seasons; he removes kings and sets up kings; he gives wisdom to the wise and knowledge to those who have understanding;

cnv.text: 他改變時間、季節； 他廢王、立王； 他賜智慧給智慧人， 賜知識給聰明人。

ccb.text: 祂改变时令和季节，废王立王， 赐智慧给智者，赐知识给哲士。
